channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: White House Reportedly Investigates Leak of Internal Discussions About Epstein Files Strategy
item.description: According to reporting cited by Raw Story, the Trump administration has reportedly begun an extensive effort to identify the source of a leak concerning internal White House discussions about the hand...

item.title: Lawmakers dispute Trump’s claim about secret oil transit in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: President Donald Trump came under scrutiny after asserting that he had carried out a “secret mission” in the Strait of Hormuz involving the safe passage of 100 million barrels of oil through the criti...

item.title: Vintage Photographs Showcase the Distinctive Bridal Fashion Trends of the 1980s
item.description: This article from Vintage Everyday presents a collection of 35 vintage portraits featuring brides from the 1980s, highlighting the distinctive wedding fashion that defined the decade. The images captu...

item.title: Space-Qualified 6 mm Metasurface Lens Demonstrates Satellite-Level Solar Magnetic Field Measurements
item.description: Researchers at the University of California San Diego, working with BAE Systems Space & Mission Systems, have developed a space-qualified optical metasurface measuring only six millimeters in diameter...

item.title: Trump Faces Criticism After Saying 'I Love the Inflation' During White House Event
item.description: President Donald Trump sparked controversy during a White House event on June 10, 2026, when he stated, 'I love the inflation' while signing the Secure America Act. The remark quickly attracted attent...

item.title: Wall Street Journal Editorial Criticizes Trump's Iran Strategy as Weak and Reactive
item.description: A Wall Street Journal editorial board analysis argued that President Donald Trump's approach to the conflict with Iran has placed the United States in a strategically weak position. According to the e...

item.title: Researchers Identify a 1,200-Kilometer Deep-Sea Whale Necropolis in the Indian Ocean
item.description: Scientists have identified what may be the largest known accumulation of whale remains ever found on the seafloor. The site, named the Diamantina Zone necropolis, stretches for more than 1,200 kilomet...

item.title: AMA Delegates Push for a Stronger Confrontation with HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. Over Public Health Policies
item.description: A report highlighted growing frustration within the American Medical Association (AMA) regarding the leadership of Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. During the AMA’s annual mee...

item.title: White Sox Call Up Top Prospect Braden Montgomery After Strong Double-A and Triple-A Performance
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have promoted outfield prospect Braden Montgomery to the major league roster, continuing the organization's youth movement and rebuilding effort. Montgomery, 23, was originally s...

item.title: Election Expert Criticizes Mike Johnson's Unsubstantiated Claims About California Primary Results
item.description: A political and election administration expert challenged recent claims by House Speaker Mike Johnson regarding alleged fraud in California's primary elections. During an interview with journalist Ada...

item.title: Parkinson's Disease Awareness: Understanding Non-Motor Symptoms, Treatment Advances, and Available Support

item.title: Dow Jones Argues Trump Cannot Deny Signature Resemblance in Epstein Birthday Book Defamation Case
item.description: A new court filing in the ongoing defamation lawsuit between President Donald Trump and Dow Jones focuses on a key dispute involving a letter included in a birthday book created for Jeffrey Epstein's ...

item.title: Nancy Mace Finishes Fifth in South Carolina Republican Gubernatorial Primary as Former Allies Criticize Her Political Career
item.description: Representative Nancy Mace's bid for governor of South Carolina ended in a decisive defeat after she finished fifth in the Republican primary election. According to the report, the result marked a sign...

item.title: Pete Hegseth Faces Criticism After Saying Guantanamo Detainees Should Have Been Executed

item.title: Musk Outlines Future SpaceX and Tesla Collaboration on Orbital Data Centers and Space-Based AI Infrastructure

item.title: Federal Judge Warns DOJ Against Reviving Suspended Anti-Weaponization Fund Amid CREW Challenge

item.title: Conservative Pastor Criticizes Obama's Presidential Center and Its Architectural Design
